notes: Round 1 — AKB-10. Voice: Liam (VCgLBmBjldJmfphyB8sZ) per AKB-19 constraint (Liam/Alice only). Opening overlap verified clean: s01 ends at 6.23s, s02 starts at 7.02s, gap=0.79s (silencedetect confirmed). 7 steps, 32.1s trimmed visual. Raw: 45.7s → boot-cut 3s → trim 32.1s.

steps.display_text: A Q&A slide turns any presentation into a two-way conversation — your audience sends questions, and you answer them live.
steps.tts_text: A Q&A slide turns any presentation into a two-way conversation — your audience sends questions, and you answer them live.

steps.display_text: Click New Presentation to open a fresh deck.
steps.tts_text: Click New Presentation to open a fresh deck.

steps.display_text: Select Q&A from the slide type picker — you'll find it in the Unscored section.
steps.tts_text: Select Q&A from the slide type picker — you'll find it in the Unscored section.

steps.display_text: Type a heading that invites your audience to ask questions — clear and welcoming works best.
steps.tts_text: Type a heading that invites your audience to ask questions — clear and welcoming works best.

steps.display_text: Choose whether questions come in on all slides, or only on this dedicated Q&A slide.
steps.tts_text: Choose whether questions come in on all slides, or only on this dedicated Q&A slide.

steps.display_text: Turn on moderation if you'd like to review questions before they appear on screen.
steps.tts_text: Turn on moderation if you'd like to review questions before they appear on screen.

steps.display_text: That's your Q&A slide ready. Hit Present, and your audience starts sending questions on their phones — you organise and answer them all from one screen.
steps.tts_text: That's your Q&A slide ready. Hit Present, and your audience starts sending questions on their phones — you organise and answer them all from one screen.

mix_command: FFMPEG=./node_modules/ffmpeg-static/ffmpeg && $FFMPEG -y -i out-qa-r1/using-qa-trimmed.webm -i out-qa-vo/s01.mp3 -i out-qa-vo/s02.mp3 -i out-qa-vo/s03.mp3 -i out-qa-vo/s04.mp3 -i out-qa-vo/s05.mp3 -i out-qa-vo/s06.mp3 -i out-qa-vo/s07.mp3 -filter_complex '[1:a]adelay=0|0[a1];[2:a]adelay=7000|7000[a2];[3:a]adelay=10500|10500[a3];[4:a]adelay=15500|15500[a4];[5:a]adelay=21000|21000[a5];[6:a]adelay=26500|26500[a6];[7:a]adelay=30500|30500[a7];[a1][a2][a3][a4][a5][a6][a7]amix=inputs=7:normalize=0[aout]' -map 0:v -map '[aout]' -c:v copy -c:a libopus -b:a 64k out-qa-r1/using-qa-narrated.webm
